# Luiz Ihara - Portfolio & Resume

> Luiz Ihara is a Quality Engineer specializing in Performance, Scalability, and Reliability across end-to-end backend, frontend, and mobile applications.

## Content Available

* [Full Resume & Portfolio](llms-full.txt) - The complete text of Luiz's resume, including about me, experience, skills, and projects.

## About the site
This is the personal portfolio and resume of Luiz Ihara. The main page is `index.html`. It is built to be accessible to humans and LLMs.
